reason: The image depicts a scene of chaos and fire on a ship, resembling the Doña Paz disaster. However, several elements are anachronistic. The clothing styles, particularly the baseball caps, t-shirts with what appear to be modern-looking graphics (like the 'DOWSON' t-shirt), and athletic shorts/shoes, look more contemporary than 1987. The quality of the clothing also suggests modern manufacturing processes and materials. The flames and wooden deck are consistent with the event, but the figures fleeing look generic and their attire is suspect. This image fails a authenticity test due to possible advanced materials used in the clothing.
